pi_items.source: HHS.gov FAQ #192 confirms final modifications published August 14, 2002. Original Privacy Rule published December 28, 2000 (Federal Register); compliance deadline April 14, 2003

privileged_info_summary: 45 CFR 160.103 is titled 'Definitions' and is codified under Title 45 (Department of Health and Human Services) of the Code of Federal Regulations. It provides foundational definitions for HIPAA administrative simplification regulations. The regulation was originally published on December 28, 2000, with an original effective date of April 14, 2001. Significant modifications were published on August 14, 2002, with a revised compliance deadline of April 14, 2003 for most covered entities. The task requires creating a reference to this real (non-synthetic) regulation in the Juris-M citation management system.
